title: The Village Festival
description: Colorful banners flutter overhead as music fills the village square. Merchants sell their wares, children laugh through the streets, and contests promise both glory and reward. It's a rare chance to enjoy life before the road calls again.

options.title: Enter the Contest
options.description: Test your skills against the village's finest.

options.title: Enjoy the Celebration
options.description: Relax, share stories, and enjoy a peaceful evening.

options.title: Pickpocket the Crowd
options.description: With everyone's attention elsewhere, heavy coin purses become easy targets.
